mapper.select:
SELECT ID, PREPAYMENT_CODE, COMPANY_NAME, COMPANY_ID, PREPAYMENT_TYPE_CODE, PREPAYMENT_TYPE_NAME, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, PREPAYMENT_TIME, PREPAYMENT_AMOUNT, UTILIZED_AMOUNT, PAYMENT_METHOD_CODE, PAYMENT_METHOD_NAME, BANK_NAME, BANK_ID, STATUS, REMARK, TRANS_SEQUENCE_IDN, VOID_REMARK, DEBTORPAYMENT_ID, SOURCE_DEBTORPAYMENT_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, TRUST_NO, BUS_TRUST_ID, cargo_info_id, BUS_TRUST_CARGO_ID, PREPAY_MODE_CODE, PREPAY_MODE_NAME, SOURCE_PREPAY_CODE FROM T_FD_BANK_CUSTOMER_PREPAYMENT
id = #{id}

SELECT ID, PREPAYMENT_CODE, COMPANY_NAME, COMPANY_ID, PREPAYMENT_TYPE_CODE, PREPAYMENT_TYPE_NAME, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, PREPAYMENT_TIME, PREPAYMENT_AMOUNT, UTILIZED_AMOUNT, PAYMENT_METHOD_CODE, PAYMENT_METHOD_NAME, BANK_NAME, BANK_ID, STATUS, REMARK, VOID_REMARK, DEBTORPAYMENT_ID, SOURCE_DEBTORPAYMENT_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, TRUST_NO, BUS_TRUST_ID, BUS_TRUST_CARGO_ID, PREPAY_MODE_CODE, PREPAY_MODE_NAME, SOURCE_PREPAY_CODE, CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_FD_BANK_CUSTOMER_PREPAYMENT
PREPAYMENT_CODE = #{prepaymentCode}
SELECT count(*) FROM T_FD_BANK_CUSTOMER_PREPAYMENT where STATUS = 1 AND SOURCE_PREPAY_CODE = #{sourcePrepayCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_FD_BANK_CUSTOMER_PREPAYMENT( ID, PREPAYMENT_CODE, COMPANY_NAME, COMPANY_ID, PREPAYMENT_TYPE_CODE, PREPAYMENT_TYPE_NAME, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, PREPAYMENT_TIME, PREPAYMENT_AMOUNT, UTILIZED_AMOUNT, PAYMENT_METHOD_CODE, PAYMENT_METHOD_NAME, BANK_NAME, BANK_ID, STATUS, REMARK, TRANS_SEQUENCE_IDN, DEBTORPAYMENT_ID, SOURCE_DEBTORPAYMENT_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, TRUST_NO, BUS_TRUST_ID, BUS_TRUST_CARGO_ID, PREPAY_MODE_CODE, PREPAY_MODE_NAME, SOURCE_PREPAY_CODE, cargo_info_id )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prepaymentCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prepaymentTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prepaymentTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prepaymentTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{prepaymentAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{utilizedAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{paymentMethodCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentMethodName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transSequenceIdn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{debtorpaymentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{sourceDebtorpaymentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now}, #{trustNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{busTrustId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{busTrustCargoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{prepayModeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prepayModeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourcePrepayCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_FD_BANK_CUSTOMER_PREPAYMENT SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PREPAYMENT_CODE = #{prepaymentCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COMPANY_NAME = #{companyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COMPANY_ID = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PREPAYMENT_TYPE_CODE = #{prepaymentTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PREPAYMENT_TYPE_NAME = #{prepaymentTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CUSTOMER_NAME = #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PREPAYMENT_TIME = #{prepaymentTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PREPAYMENT_AMOUNT = #{prepaymentAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, UTILIZED_AMOUNT = #{utilizedAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, PAYMENT_METHOD_CODE = #{paymentMethodCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PAYMENT_METHOD_NAME = #{paymentMethodName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BANK_NAME = #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BANK_ID = #{bankId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRANS_SEQUENCE_IDN = #{transSequenceIdn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}, TRUST_NO = #{trustNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BUS_TRUST_ID = #{busTrustId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, BUS_TRUST_CARGO_ID =#{busTrustCargoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
id = #{id}

UPDATE T_FD_BANK_CUSTOMER_PREPAYMENT SET STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VOID_REMARK = #{voidRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VOID_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, VOID_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VOID_TIME = #{now}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT t.id AS busTrustId, t1.id AS busTrustCargoId, t.TRUST_NO, t.TRUST_TYPE, t.IMP_EXP, t.PROCESS_NAME, t.PROCESS_CODE, t.PLAN_QUANTITY, t.PLAN_TON, t.TRADE_TYPE, t.CUSTOMER_NAME, t.COMPANY_NAME, CONCAT(CONCAT(t.SHIP_NAME, '_'),t2.VOYAGE) as shipNameVoyage, t1.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, t1.CARGO_AGENT_NAME, t1.CARGO_NAME, m.SOURCE_CD FROM T_BUS_TRUST t LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO t1 ON t1.TRUST_ID = t.id LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM t2 ON t.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = t2.ID LEFT JOIN M_WORK_PROCESS m ON m.PROCESS_CD = t.PROCESS_CODE WHERE t.STATUS IN (10,20)
AND t.TRUST_NO LIKE #{workNo}

select SUM(PREPAYMENT_AMOUNT) AS "prepaymentAmount" FROM T_FD_BANK_CUSTOMER_PREPAYMENT WHERE STATUS = '1' AND BUS_TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and cargo_info_id = #{cargoInfoId} GROUP BY BUS_TRUST_ID
select id,est_amount,trust_id,cargo_info_id from t_bus_trust_cargo where trust_id = #{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and cargo_info_id = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update: update t_bus_cargo_info set IS_PRE_PAY = #{status} where id = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
